# BookedForYou

> AI-powered receptionist and business management platform for tradespeople in Ireland.

BookedForYou is a SaaS product that provides an AI receptionist for trade businesses like plumbers, electricians, roofers, carpenters, painters, and HVAC technicians. The AI answers business phone calls 24/7, books appointments automatically by checking calendar availability, and manages customer relationships.

## Core Features

- AI Receptionist: Answers business calls professionally, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
- Smart Scheduling: Automatically books appointments and syncs with Google Calendar
- Customer Management: Tracks clients, job history, and preferences
- Worker Management: Assigns jobs to team members and prevents scheduling conflicts
- Materials & Invoicing: Tracks materials, costs, and sends professional invoices
- Financial Tracking: Monitors revenue, payments, and business performance
- SMS Notifications: Sends booking confirmations and day-before reminders
- Call Summaries: AI-generated summaries of every call

## Pricing

- Free Trial: 14 days, all features included, no credit card required
- Pro Plan: Custom pricing tailored to business size

## Target Audience

Small to medium trade businesses in Ireland who miss calls while on the job and lose potential customers as a result. Typical users are sole traders or small teams of 1-10 workers.
